entities.description: As a subsection of '引脚说明', this section provides detailed information about the pin pull-up/pull-down configurations and series resistor explanations, which are critical for understanding the hardware design of the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board.
Refers to the electrical configuration of pins, specifically pull-up and pull-down resistors, which are discussed in section 2.4.
Refers to the series resistor configuration used in pin setups, as explained in section 2.4.

relations.description: The concept of '引脚上下拉' (pin pull-up/pull-down) is a primary topic of section 2.4.
The concept of '串联' (series resistor configuration) is a primary topic of section 2.4.
